sources.title: Barbie official site — factual editorial context only

runtime.title: Fashion Dream
runtime.subtitle: Build a clean style chain under shifting spotlights
runtime.fantasy: The Host verifies color, shape and sequence signals across a living editorial runway without using any third-party character, logo, outfit, architecture or product design.

forbiddenMotifs: official doll faces, hair silhouettes or body proportions
Dreamhouse architecture or recognizable room layouts
official outfits, accessories, packaging or vehicles
official music, dialogue or interface elements

mechanics.fallbackBehavior: If style-chain presentation fails, each target becomes a normal single-target clear with the same base reward and no progression penalty.

targets.label: Palette Scout
targets.silhouette: A compact fan-shaped signal with three large, unequal swatches and one grounded stem.
targets.behavior: Shows the first broad color family in the current style chain and rewards a fast correct scan.

targets.label: Stitch Courier
targets.silhouette: A slim folded-paper courier with one oversized route ribbon and no human likeness.
targets.behavior: Carries the second chain symbol between two fixed lanes before entering scan range.

targets.label: Mirror Node
targets.silhouette: An asymmetric oval reflector inside a low tripod frame with a broken diagonal reflection line.
targets.behavior: Repeats one earlier chain property and asks the player to verify rather than simply match color.

targets.label: Spotlight Rival
targets.silhouette: A tall aperture tower with two rotating shutters and a broad triangular base.
targets.behavior: Changes the active spotlight rhythm and offers a Focus-or-Notes choice when cleared.

targets.label: Runway Signal
targets.silhouette: A horizontal light rail with three raised editorial tabs and one centered verification beacon.
targets.behavior: Foreshadows the Gate by presenting a full three-part chain with a forgiving timing window.

boss.label: Prism Director
boss.silhouette: A large radial editorial rig with four broad shutters, one central prism and a stable grounded pedestal.
boss.behavior: Runs three readable style-chain phases; each completed phase breaks one shutter and locks in a permanent reward multiplier for the encounter only.

easterEggs.description: The Pack moves from morning pastels to an evening editorial spotlight over its ten Zones.
easterEggs.originalityNote: A day-to-night fashion-show arc is a broad genre convention; the environment, timing, shapes, copy and characters are original APN designs and do not reproduce a protected scene or property.
easterEggs.trigger: Complete Zones 1, 5 and 9 in the same Pack.

easterEggs.description: Three consecutive perfect chains make the runway rail briefly arrange itself into a clean three-look editorial spread.
easterEggs.originalityNote: The reward references fashion editorial sequencing generally; it contains no branded outfit, doll, wordmark, packaging or recognizable third-party design.
easterEggs.trigger: Achieve three perfect style chains without a miss.

easterEggs.description: A rare archive card records the color name 'Signal Rose 59' and unlocks an APN-only visor accent.
easterEggs.originalityNote: The color is an APN semantic token with an internal catalog number, not an official brand color name, product reference or third-party mark.
easterEggs.trigger: Clear the Prism Director with Priority Tag active and at least 90% Focus.

fallback.reasonCopy: Fashion Dream is temporarily using the APN Core signal route.
